mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_map WHERE dataMapId=#{dataMapId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=5
mapper.update: UPDATE data_map SET idxLabel=#{idxLabel}, nextLabel=#{nextLabel}, dataName=#{dataName}, price=#{price}, val=#{val}, description=#{description} WHERE dataMapId = #{dataMapId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM data_map WHERE dataMapId=#{dataMapId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=3
mapper.update: UPDATE data_map SET idxLabel=#{idxLabel}, nextLabel=#{nextLabel}, dataName=#{dataName}, price=#{price}, description=#{description} WHERE dataMapId = #{dataMapId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=2
SELECT * FROM data_map WHERE dataMapId=#{dataMapId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=3
mapper.update: UPDATE data_map SET dataName=#{dataName}, price=#{price}, val=#{val}, nextVal=#{nextVal}, description=#{description} WHERE dataMapId = #{dataMapId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=4
SELECT * FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=4
SELECT price FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=4 order by price desc limit 1
SELECT * FROM `data_map` WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_map WHERE idxLabeL=2 and nextLabel=3 and price=#{price}
select ifnull(nextLabel+1,1) from data_map where idxLabeL=6 order by nextLabel desc limit 1
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM data_map WHERE dataMapId IN
#{id}
